project: Ralph 智能体真实环境测试 - qwen3.5:4b
description: 使用本地 qwen3.5:4b 模型进行端到端测试，验证 Ralph 循环完整流程

tasks.title: 测试 Ollama Runtime Chat - qwen3.5:4b
tasks.description: 验证 OllamaRuntime 能用 qwen3.5:4b 模型进行对话
tasks.verification: python -c "from infrastructure.llm.ollama import OllamaRuntime; from langchain_core.messages import HumanMessage; r = OllamaRuntime(default_model='qwen3.5:4b'); resp = r.chat([HumanMessage('1+1等于几')]); print('OK:' + resp.generations[0].message.content[:50])"

tasks.title: 测试决策中间件 - 任务拆解
tasks.description: 验证 DecisionMiddleware 能用 qwen3.5:4b 拆解任务为原子步骤
tasks.verification: python -c "from infrastructure.llm.ollama import OllamaRuntime; from middleware.decision import DecisionMiddleware; r = OllamaRuntime(default_model='qwen3.5:4b'); d = DecisionMiddleware(r); steps = d.decompose_to_atomic_steps('列出当前目录的Python文件'); print('OK: ' + str(len(steps)) + ' steps')"

tasks.title: 测试执行中间件 - 工具验证
tasks.description: 验证 ExecutionMiddleware 能执行工具并验证结果
tasks.verification: python -c "from middleware.execution import ExecutionMiddleware; from infrastructure.tool_verifier import ToolVerifier; tv = ToolVerifier('./tools/custom'); e = ExecutionMiddleware(tv, './tools/custom'); print('OK')"

tasks.title: 测试反馈中间件 - 结果评估
tasks.description: 验证 FeedbackMiddleware 能评估执行结果
tasks.verification: python -c "from middleware.feedback import FeedbackMiddleware; f = FeedbackMiddleware(); state = {'atomic_plan': [{'step': 1, 'status': 'completed'}]}; eval = f.evaluate(state); print('OK: ' + eval['reason'][:30])"

tasks.title: 测试任务状态管理
tasks.description: 验证 TaskState 能创建、更新、完成任务
tasks.verification: python -c "from infrastructure.task_state import TaskState; import shutil; ts = TaskState('./runtime_test'); tid = ts.create_task('测试任务'); state = ts.load_task(tid); ts.complete_task(tid, {'result': 'ok'}); shutil.rmtree('./runtime_test', ignore_errors=True); print('OK')"

tasks.title: 端到端测试 - Ralph 循环单次迭代
tasks.description: 验证完整的 Ralph 循环单次迭代能正常工作
tasks.verification: python -c "from infrastructure.llm.ollama import OllamaRuntime; from infrastructure.task_state import TaskState; from middleware.decision import DecisionMiddleware; r = OllamaRuntime(default_model='qwen3.5:4b'); ts = TaskState('./runtime_e2e'); tid = ts.create_task('测试Ralph循环'); state = ts.load_task(tid); d = DecisionMiddleware(r); steps = d.decompose_to_atomic_steps(state['goal']); print('OK: ' + str(len(steps))); import shutil; shutil.rmtree('./runtime_e2e', ignore_errors=True)"

tasks.title: 测试 Ollama 模型列表
tasks.description: 验证能获取本地所有可用模型
tasks.verification: python -c "from infrastructure.llm.ollama import OllamaRuntime; r = OllamaRuntime(); models = r.list_models(); print('OK: ' + str(len(models)) + ' models')"

tasks.title: 测试决策中间件工具绑定
tasks.description: 验证 DecisionMiddleware 能为每个步骤绑定工具
tasks.verification: python -c "from infrastructure.llm.ollama import OllamaRuntime; from middleware.decision import DecisionMiddleware; r = OllamaRuntime(default_model='qwen3.5:4b'); d = DecisionMiddleware(r); steps = d.decompose_to_atomic_steps('分析当前目录结构'); has_tool = all(s.required_tool for s in steps); print('OK: all steps have tools' if has_tool else 'FAIL')"
